nasb.text: But you shall remember that you were a slave in Egypt, and that the Lord your God redeemed you from there; therefore I am commanding you to do this thing.

esv.text: but you shall remember that you were a slave in Egypt and the Lord your God redeemed you from there; therefore I command you to do this.

cnv.text: 你要記住你在埃及作過奴僕，耶和華你的　神把你從那裡救贖出來；所以我吩咐你要遵行這話。

ccb.text: 要记住，你们曾在埃及做过奴隶，你们的上帝耶和华拯救了你们。所以，我吩咐你们这样行。
